services.title: Website design & development
services.description: Custom, mobile-first websites built to load fast, rank well, and turn visitors into bookings. No clunky templates — just sites that feel made for you.

services.title: SEO & local search
services.description: Show up when neighbors search. We get you on the map — literally — for the terms that bring real customers.

services.title: Google & social ads
services.description: Smart campaigns that stretch every dollar and put your business in front of ready-to-buy locals.

services.title: Branding & identity
services.description: Logos, colors, and a look that makes you memorable — so you stand out from the shop down the street.

services.title: Care & analytics
services.description: We keep your site fast, secure, and improving — with plain-English reports on what's actually working.

work.title: Brewhouse Café
work.description: A warm new site plus online ordering that turned weekend lines into pre-orders.

work.title: Sharp & Co. Barbers
work.description: Slick booking-first website with a campaign that kept every chair full.

work.title: GreenLeaf Day Spa
work.description: A calming redesign that ranks #1 locally and books out weeks ahead.

work.title: PipeWorks Plumbing
work.description: An emergency-ready site that turns 2am searches into morning callouts.

pricing.name: Launch
pricing.tagline: Get online fast with a polished one-pager that converts.

pricing.name: Grow
pricing.tagline: A full website plus the SEO foundation to get you found.

pricing.name: Scale
pricing.tagline: Website plus done-for-you marketing, month after month.

reviews.text: Our old site looked like it was from 2009. AlexMedia gave us something we're genuinely proud to share — and the phone hasn't stopped ringing since.
reviews.name: Jenna Morales

reviews.text: They actually understood my business, not just the website. Bookings are way up and I finally show up when people search nearby.
reviews.name: Ryan Sharp

reviews.text: Fast, friendly, and no confusing tech-speak. The monthly reports are so clear I always know exactly where my marketing money goes.
reviews.name: Tara Kelly
